positive: A stylized, highly detailed representation of bioluminescent deep-sea flora intertwined with crystalline geometric patterns. The composition must be central and symmetrical, featuring thick, contrasting silhouettes of alien leaves, glowing tendrils, and stylized oceanic life. Use a palette dominated by deep indigo, sapphire blue, iridescent teal, and accents of electric lime green, evoking a mysterious, cosmic bioluminescence. The aesthetic should combine Art Nouveau elegance with modern geometric etching, suitable for direct apparel transfer. High contrast, vector art feel, clean lines, and extreme sharpness.
negative: artifacts, text, watermark, logo, blur, grain, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, signature, messy, messy background, faded, gradient (unless intended for glow)
